ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 尚未注册任何 MCP 服务器。

ast.source: Agent Fleet: Slack WebSocket open failed

ast.target: 代理机队：Telegram 入站处理器抛出异常

ast.source: Agent Fleet: Telegram agent switch handler threw
ast.target: 代理机队：Telegram 代理切换处理器抛出异常

ast.name: error
ast.source: Agent Fleet: channel manager failed to start
ast.target: 代理机队：频道管理器启动失败

ast.name: error
ast.target: 代理机队：MCP 导入失败

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used by agents with adapter “codex”. Install via `npm i -g @openai/codex` and authenticate with `codex login` in a terminal first.
ast.target: 供使用适配器“codex”的代理使用。请先通过 `npm i -g @openai/codex` 安装，并在终端中运行 `codex login` 进行认证。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Fallback for agents that don’t set their own. Aliases (opus/sonnet/haiku) work on any backend; use Custom for pinned IDs or Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry.
ast.target: 供未设置自身模型的代理使用的后备选项。别名（opus/sonnet/haiku）适用于任何后端；对于固定的模型 ID 或 Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry，请使用“自定义”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Days to keep run logs before auto-prune.
ast.target: 自动清理前保留运行日志的天数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long a chat session waits for any output from the Claude CLI before killing the subprocess and surfacing a timeout error. Raise this if your agents run long tools (e.g. large web fetches, builds) and you're seeing spurious 'no response' errors.
ast.target: 聊天会话在终止子进程并报告超时错误前，等待 Claude CLI 任何输出的时长。如果你的代理运行耗时较长的工具（例如大型网页抓取、构建）并出现虚假的“无响应”错误，请调高此值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Checks that the configured binary is reachable.
ast.target: 检查配置的二进制文件是否可达。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Checks that the configured Codex binary is reachable.
ast.target: 检查配置的 Codex 二进制文件是否可达。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hard cap on live claude subprocesses across all channels. Oldest idle session is hibernated when exceeded.
ast.target: 所有频道中活跃的 Claude 子进程的硬性上限。超出时，最旧的空闲会话将被休眠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Channel sessions with no activity for this long get their subprocess hibernated. State is preserved and the next message resumes transparently.
ast.target: 频道会话在无活动达到此时长后，其子进程将被休眠。状态会被保留，下一条消息将透明地恢复会话。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum messages allowed per external conversation within the rolling window.
ast.target: 滚动窗口内每个外部对话允许的最大消息数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 供 _fleet/channels/*.md 文件中的 `credential_ref` 使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generated in your Slack app's Basic Information → App-Level Tokens.
ast.target: 在你的 Slack 应用的“基本信息”→“应用级别令牌”中生成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new scoped wiki agent. All fields optional.
ast.target: 创建一个新的限定范围的 wiki 代理。所有字段均为可选。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Vault-relative path. Empty = whole vault.
ast.target: 可选。相对于保险库的路径。留空表示整个保险库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Agent name suffix. Default: derived from scope folder name, or 'wiki-keeper' for whole-vault.
ast.target: 可选。代理名称后缀。默认值：从范围文件夹名称派生，或对于整个保险库为 'wiki-keeper'。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Watched mode only — files whose last modification date is before this are skipped. Defaults to today so an established vault doesn't flood the keeper on first run. Clear the field to process everything.
ast.target: 仅限监视模式 — 最后修改日期早于此日期的文件将被跳过。默认为今天，以避免已建立的保险库在首次运行时淹没守护进程。清空此字段以处理所有文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Slack/Telegram channel for ingest + lint summaries. Leave as (none) to disable.
ast.target: 可选。用于接收摘要和 lint 报告的 Slack/Telegram 频道。保留为（无）以禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hard cap on token spend per run. Unprocessed files resume next cycle.
ast.target: 每次运行的 token 消耗硬性上限。未处理的文件将在下一个周期恢复。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, wiki-query files long answers under _topics/syntheses/. Off = answers live only in chat.
ast.target: 如果开启，wiki 查询会将长答案保存在 _topics/syntheses/ 下。关闭 = 答案仅存在于聊天中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, external-channel (Slack/Telegram) replies rewrite [[wikilinks]] as obsidian:// URLs.
ast.target: 如果开启，外部频道（Slack/Telegram）的回复会将 [[wikilinks]] 重写为 obsidian:// URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 逗号或换行符分隔的、相对于保险库的路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 要跳过的 Glob 模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Watched mode skips files older than this date. Clear to process everything.
ast.target: 监视模式会跳过早于此日期的文件。清空以处理所有文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Separate budget for the synthesis-refresh phase that regenerates topic-page summaries.
ast.target: 用于重新生成主题页面摘要的合成刷新阶段的独立预算。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Topic-page count above which index.md splits into per-type sub-MOCs.
ast.target: 主题页面数量超过此值时，index.md 将拆分为按类型划分的子 MOC。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Lint flags topic-page summaries older than this and chains wiki-refresh.
ast.target: Lint 会标记早于此日期的主题页面摘要，并触发 wiki 刷新链。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Levenshtein-ratio above which lint proposes merging two same-type pages (0.0–1.0).
ast.target: Lint 建议合并两个同类型页面的 Levenshtein 比率阈值（0.0–1.0）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Compounding: wiki-query files long answers under _topics/syntheses/ and bullets each cited topic page. Default ON.
ast.target: 复合模式：wiki 查询会将长答案保存在 _topics/syntheses/ 下，并为每个引用的主题页面生成要点。默认开启。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Rewrite [[wikilinks]] as obsidian:// URLs when replying via Slack/Telegram.
ast.target: 通过 Slack/Telegram 回复时，将 [[wikilinks]] 重写为 obsidian:// URL。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 监视自修改以来的文件

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No lint report yet. Run wiki-lint manually or wait for the weekly task to fire.
ast.target: 尚无 lint 报告。请手动运行 wiki-lint 或等待每周任务触发。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Agent Fleet: couldn't install MCP projection; run proceeds without fleet MCP.
ast.target: Agent Fleet: 无法安装 MCP 投影；进程将在没有 fleet MCP 的情况下继续。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Agent Fleet: SecretStorage unavailable (Obsidian < 1.11.4). Secrets will use plaintext fallback.
ast.target: Agent Fleet: SecretStorage 不可用 (Obsidian < 1.11.4)。密钥将使用明文回退。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Agent Fleet: injectMessage stdin write failed
ast.target: Agent Fleet: injectMessage stdin 写入失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Agent Fleet: failed to save inbound image
ast.target: Agent Fleet: 保存入站图像失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Agent Fleet: agent switch confirmation failed
ast.target: Agent Fleet: 代理切换确认失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Agent Fleet: Slack envelope ACK failed
ast.target: Agent Fleet: Slack 信封 ACK 失败

ast.name: warn
ast.target: Agent Fleet: Telegram sendChatAction 失败

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Agent Fleet: Telegram image download failed
ast.target: Agent Fleet: Telegram 图像下载失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Fill in the reference name and bot token.
ast.target: 请填写引用名称和机器人令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Slack requires both bot token and app-level token.
ast.target: Slack 需要同时提供机器人令牌和应用级令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Transport config must be a JSON object.
ast.target: 传输配置必须是一个 JSON 对象。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Pick a date/time for the one-time run.
ast.target: 请选择一次性运行的日期/时间。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No URL found for this server — can't authenticate.
ast.target: 未找到此服务器的 URL — 无法进行认证。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Command is required for stdio servers.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: URL is required for HTTP/SSE servers.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Enter a bearer token, or choose a different auth method.
ast.target: 请输入 Bearer 令牌，或选择其他认证方式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Agent Fleet: channel manager failed to start — check console.
ast.target: Agent Fleet: 频道管理器启动失败 — 请检查控制台。

ast.name: error
ast.source: a wildcard in the middle of a command can't be expressed as a prefix rule
ast.target: 命令中间的通配符无法表示为前缀规则

ast.name: error
ast.source: a bare wildcard matches every command — use the read-only sandbox instead
ast.target: 裸通配符匹配所有命令——请改用只读沙箱

ast.name: message
ast.source: Couldn't apply — target skill not found; proposal left pending.
ast.target: 无法应用——目标技能未找到；提案保持待处理状态。

ast.name: message
ast.source: A reflection is already in progress.

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: You are being contacted via Slack. Keep replies concise...
ast.target: 您正通过 Slack 被联系。请保持回复简洁...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 笔记、运行手册片段、升级联系人…

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: You are a deployment monitoring agent...
ast.target: 您是一个部署监控代理...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Check status, scan for issues, report findings...
ast.target: 检查状态、扫描问题、报告发现...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 此代理的自定义技能/指令...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 背景信息、代码库结构、约定...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Skill instructions — what does this skill do and how should agents use it?
ast.target: 技能指令——这个技能做什么，代理应该如何使用它？

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target:
## 命令

### list
用法: tool list [--filter <query>]
...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: API 文档、过滤语法、约定...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source:
## Example: List all tasks

User: Show me my tasks for today

Agent: ...
ast.target:
## 示例：列出所有任务

用户：显示我今天的任务

代理：...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Describe what the agent should do...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 给代理发消息… (Ctrl+Enter 发送)

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 在话题中发消息… (Ctrl+Enter 发送)

ast.name: text
ast.source: Move the agent definition to trash
ast.target: 将代理定义移至回收站

ast.name: text
ast.target: 尚未配置任何频道凭证。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Per-scope wiki agents. Each runs its own inbox + watched folders + topics + heartbeat. All fields on the Add form are optional — click Create with everything blank to get a whole-vault keeper with defaults.
ast.target: 按作用域划分的Wiki代理。每个代理运行自己的收件箱、监视文件夹、主题和心跳。添加表单上的所有字段均为可选——在所有字段留空的情况下点击“创建”，即可获得一个使用默认设置的全库守护者。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No Wiki Keepers yet. Click Add to create one.
ast.target: 尚无Wiki守护者。点击“添加”以创建一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click Create with everything blank and you'll get a whole-vault keeper with sensible defaults (inbox at _sources/inbox, topics at topics/, nightly ingest at 3am, Sunday lint).
ast.target: 在所有字段留空的情况下点击“创建”，您将获得一个使用合理默认设置的全库守护者（收件箱位于 _sources/inbox，主题位于 topics/，每晚凌晨3点进行数据摄取，周日进行检查）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No agents available. Add existing, enabled agents to `allowed_agents` in the channel file.
ast.target: 没有可用的代理。请在频道文件的 `allowed_agents` 中添加现有的、已启用的代理。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All clear. Nothing requires manual review from this lint pass.
ast.target: 一切正常。本次检查无需人工审核。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Connect an external chat transport to an agent
ast.target: 将外部聊天传输连接到代理

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure a new agent for your fleet
ast.target: 为您的舰队配置一个新代理

ast.name: text
ast.source: Controls reasoning depth — low is fast, max is most thorough
ast.target: 控制推理深度——低为快速，最高为最彻底

ast.name: text
ast.source: On Codex agents these become execpolicy command rules — only Bash(cmd args *) prefixes are enforced; tool-name rules (Read/Write) and mid-pattern wildcards are ignored, and file/network access is governed by Permission Mode (the sandbox).
ast.target: 在Codex代理上，这些会成为execpolicy命令规则——仅强制执行Bash(cmd args *)前缀；工具名称规则（Read/Write）和中间模式通配符会被忽略，文件/网络访问由权限模式（沙箱）控制。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Define a reusable skill for your agents
ast.target: 为您的代理定义一个可重用的技能

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure a new task for your fleet
ast.target: 为您的舰队配置一个新任务

ast.name: text
ast.source: Servers from the MCP Servers tab. Checked servers are available to this agent on any adapter (Claude or Codex). Leave all unchecked to grant every enabled server.
ast.target: 来自MCP服务器标签页的服务器。勾选的服务器可在任何适配器（Claude或Codex）上供此代理使用。全部不勾选则授予所有已启用的服务器。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add one in the MCP Servers tab.
ast.target: 在MCP服务器标签页中添加一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click "Probe tools" to discover the tools this server exposes.
ast.target: 点击“探测工具”以发现此服务器暴露的工具。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Register a new MCP server for agents to use
ast.target: 注册一个新的MCP服务器供代理使用

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create an agent to start chatting
ast.target: 创建一个代理以开始聊天

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose an agent from the dropdown above
ast.target: 从上方的下拉菜单中选择一个代理
